chapter_title: Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles
text: This article is not intended to affect the rights granted pursuant to subdivision (g) of Section 11580.2 of the Insurance Code.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 9. CIVIL LIABILITY [17000 - 17714]
### Chapter 1. Civil Liability of Owners and Operators of Vehicles [17000 - 17463]
#### Article 2.5. Uninsured Owners [17200 - 17202]
##### § 17202

This article is not intended to affect the rights granted pursuant to subdivision (g) of Section 11580.2 of the Insurance Code.

*(Added by Stats. 1983, Ch. 1252, Sec. 10.)*

subsections.text: This article is not intended to affect the rights granted pursuant to subdivision (g) of Section 11580.2 of the Insurance Code.
